## Git

- Main branch: `main` â€” never commit directly
- Working branch: `develop`
- Feature branches: `feature/<name>`
- Fix branches: `fix/<name>`
- Chore branches: `chore/<name>`

Commit format (Conventional Commits):
```
<type>(<scope>): <description>

feat:     new feature
fix:      bug fix
chore:    tooling, deps, config
docs:     documentation only
refactor: no behaviour change
test:     adding or fixing tests
```

Rules:
- Always ask before committing unless told otherwise
- Run tests before every commit
- Never commit: .env, node_modules, build output
- Never push to main directly
- PR title = same format as commit message

---

## Boundaries

- Do not build features outside MVP.md Phase 1 without asking
- Do not install new dependencies without asking
- Do not refactor working code unless asked
- Do not modify .env files
- Do not push to remote without explicit instruction
- Ask before any change affecting more than 3 files
- Read MVP.md before starting any new feature
